# Third-party notices

The files under [`Vendor/`](Vendor) are copied **unmodified** from the Fluid project's benchmark
suite (`Fluid.Benchmarks/`) and are redistributed here under Fluid's MIT license, reproduced below
as that license requires.

- **Project:** Fluid — https://github.com/sebastienros/fluid
- **Vendored path:** `Fluid.Benchmarks/`
- **Commit:** `1fa7c0bc0d86b51279272da4438a802650b8a89b` (2026-06-22)
- **Vendored files:** `product.liquid`, `product.mustache`, `blogpost.liquid`, `Product.cs`,
  `BaseBenchmarks.cs`, `FluidBenchmarks.cs`, `ScribanBenchmarks.cs`, `DotLiquidBenchmarks.cs`,
  `HandlebarsBenchmarks.cs`

The Heddle entry and local harness wiring in the parent folder (`product.heddle`, `Heddle*.cs`,
`Parity.cs`, `Program.cs`) are original to this repository and licensed under the repository's own
license (Apache-2.0).
